description_long: This is a modern, single-story house featuring a flat roof and a clean, minimalist design. The structure is composed of several interconnected rectangular volumes, with large floor-to-ceiling windows and sliding glass doors that provide ample natural light and seamless indoor-outdoor flow. A private swimming pool is situated adjacent to the house, surrounded by a small patio area and several palm trees, creating a resort-like atmosphere. The exterior walls are predominantly white, complemented by dark window frames and subtle landscaping. The layout includes multiple rooms, visible through the transparent windows, and a central dining area with direct access to the outdoor space. The overall aesthetic is contemporary, emphasizing open spaces and a strong connection to the outdoors.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, large glass windows, and an adjacent swimming pool surrounded by palm trees. The design is minimalist and open, with white walls and dark window frames.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, large glass doors, and the dining area, with the pool and palm trees visible to the left.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the extensive window arrangement, the pool area, and the palm trees behind the house.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the pool, patio, and the back facade with more glass doors and windows.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the pool, palm trees, and the side elevation with fewer windows.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large floor-to-ceiling windows and sliding glass doors
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features large glass double doors, no steps, and a minimalist overhang, emphasizing openness and accessibility.
